top_signals.title: Bitcoin drops to $58K on high US PCE inflation as trader sees 'manipulation'
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin fell to 21-month lows as stock market volatility accompanied three-year highs in US PCE inflation, leading to $600 million in hourly crypto liquidations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Rise on Signs US Economy Is in Good Shape: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders lifted stocks as signs the world’s largest economy remains solid despite elevated inflation bolstered bets that Corporate America’s earnings will keep powering ahead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Airfares Are Staying High Even as the Jet Fuel Crisis Fades
top_signals.summary: A historic jet fuel crisis is now fading as prices fall globally, but US passengers are yet to see the benefit with airfares still elevated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump Requests $11.1 Billion in New Aid for Struggling Farmers
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump had a surprise for the farmers he invited for dinner at the White House later Thursday: a request to Congress for $11.1 billion in assistance that would amount to the second bailout of the year for the beleaguered agriculture sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mandiant reveals how Cisco SD-WAN zero-day attacks gained root access
top_signals.summary: New details have been revealed on how hackers exploited a Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-20245 in zero-day attacks to create rogue root accounts on targeted devices. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, April 2026
top_signals.summary: The U.S. monthly international trade deficit decreased in April 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau. The deficit decreased from $56.6 billion in March (revised) to $55.9 billion in April, as exports increased more than imports. The goods deficit decreased $2.4 billion in April to $83.7 billion. The services surplus decreased $1.7 billion in April to $27.8 billion. Full Text

top_signals.title: Canadian defense minister says he discussed GCAP fighter with Japanese counterpart
top_signals.summary: Canada's potential interest comes as the ⁠program attracts attention from potential new partners and a rival European fighter project has collapsed.
